name: MiniSearch
description: Minimalist web-searching platform with an AI assistant that runs directly from your browser. Uses Wllama and SearXNG. Demo: https://felladrin-minisearch.hf.space
summaryZh: Minimalist web-searching platform with an AI assistant that runs directly from your browser. Uses Wllama and SearXNG. Demo: https://felladrin-minisearch.hf.space 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
